title: Looking for Hotel Manager at ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners
company: ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners:
ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners!
